chunks.page_summary: This document outlines Modbus TCP input registers for various sensor parameters, including viscosity, density, and temperature, detailing their addresses, data types, and scaling factors.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Modbus TCP - Input Registers
Modified on: Thu, 29 Feb, 2024 at 9:58 PM

For each parameter there are four registers associated; the first two contain the value of the parameter in float data type, and the last two are the value scaled by 100 in Int16 format, and the status of the parameter in UInt16.

The table uses PDU addressing; addresses start at zero. Depending on the PLC used it might be required to add 1 to the addresses in the table below.

Modbus input registers

Address (Dec) | Register (Dec) | Length (Reg.) | Type | Description
---|---|---|---|---
Parameter 0 | Viscosity median | | |
40 | 300041 | 2 | Float32 | Parameter 0 value as float
42 | 300043 | 1 | SInt16 | Parameter 0 value scaled by 100
Parameter 1 | Density median | | |
48 | 300049 | 2 | Float32 | Parameter 1 value as float
50 | 300051 | 1 | SInt16 | Parameter 1 value scaled by 100
Parameter 2 | Temperature median | | |
56 | 300057 | 2 | Float32 | Parameter 2 value as float
58 | 300059 | 1 | SInt16 | Parameter 2 value scaled by 100
Parameter 3 | Kinematic Viscosity | | |
64 | 300065 | 2 | Float32 | Parameter 3 value as float
66 | 300067 | 1 | SInt16 | Parameter 3 value scaled by 100
Parameter 4 | Density Average | | |
72 | 300073 | 2 | Float32 | Parameter 4 value as float
74 | 300075 | 1 | SInt16 | Parameter 4 value scaled by 100
Parameter 5 | Viscosity raw 'process measurement' | | |
80 | 300081 | 2 | Float32 | Parameter 5 value as float
82 | 300083 | 1 | SInt16 | Parameter 5 value scaled by 100
Parameter 6 | Density raw | | |
88 | 300089 | 2 | Float32 | Parameter 6 value as float
90 | 300091 | 1 | SInt16 | Parameter 6 value scaled by 100
Parameter 7 | Temperature raw | | |
96 | 300097 | 2 | Float32 | Parameter 7 value as float
98 | 300099 | 1 | SInt16 | Parameter 7 value scaled by 100
key_facts: The document was last modified on Thursday, February 29, 2024, at 9:58 PM.
For each parameter, four registers are stated to be associated.
The first two registers for a parameter are intended to contain its value in float data type.
The last two registers for a parameter are intended to contain its value scaled by 100 in Int16 format and its status in UInt16 format.
The provided Modbus input registers table uses PDU addressing, with addresses starting at zero.
The table lists Modbus registers for median viscosity, median density, median temperature, kinematic viscosity, average density, raw viscosity, raw density, and raw temperature.
For each parameter in the table, two Modbus entries are provided: one as a Float32 value (2 registers long) and one as a SInt16 value scaled by 100 (1 register long).
warnings_notes: Depending on the PLC used, it might be required to add 1 to the addresses listed in the Modbus input registers table.

chunks.page_summary: This page details various operational parameters, their Modbus register addresses, data types, and scaling information for a Rheonics device.

extracted_text.description: Displays of mapped value from Modbus register 512
Displays of mapped value from Modbus register 514
Displays of mapped value from Modbus register 516

specifications.Parameter 8 Resonant Frequency: Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 9 Compensated Resonant Frequen: Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 10 Damping Frequency: Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 11 Coil Temperature: Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 12 Viscosity Last Good: Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 13 Density Last Good: Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 14 Mapped Value (Modbus 512): Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 15 Mapped Value (Modbus 514): Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 16 Mapped Value (Modbus 516): Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 17 Estimated Temperature: Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 18 Temperature from PT1000 sen: Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)
specifications.Parameter 19 Calculated parameter from v: Float32 (value as float), SInt16 (value scaled by 100)

key_facts: The document lists operational parameters from Parameter 8 to Parameter 20, providing their Modbus register addresses and data representation details.
Most parameters offer two data representations: a 32-bit floating-point (Float32) value and a 16-bit signed integer (SInt16) value scaled by 100.
Parameter 20, 'Calculated parameter from density models', only explicitly lists a 32-bit floating-point representation on this page.
Parameters covered include physical measurements like Resonant Frequency, Damping Frequency, Coil Temperature, Estimated Temperature, and Temperature from PT1000 sensor.
The table also includes computed values such as Compensated Resonant Frequency, 'Last Good' Viscosity and Density, and parameters derived from viscosity and density models.
Modbus register addresses are provided, ranging from 300105 to 300201, typically with a word count of 2 for Float32 and 1 for SInt16 values.
Parameters 14, 15, and 16 are described as displaying values mapped from Modbus registers 512, 514, and 516 respectively.

chunks.page_summary: This page details various sensor parameters, including their identification codes, data sizes, data types, and descriptive explanations for values such as those from concentration models, sensor cleanliness ratio, and error status.

key_facts: Parameter 21 is a calculated parameter derived from concentration models.
Parameter 22 represents the Sensor Cleanliness Ratio.
Sensor Status indicates the Sensor Error Status.
Parameter 20 value is provided as a SInt16, scaled by 100.
Parameter 21 value can be represented as a Float32 or as a SInt16 scaled by 100.
Parameter 22 value can be represented as a Float32 or as a SInt16 scaled by 100.
